analysis: The project currently has a dark, cosmic theme with black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The existing CSS and HTML files are partially completed, with some pending tasks related to animations, mobile navigation, and interactive elements. The theme aligns with the event's focus on black holes, but there are opportunities to enhance the visual experience with more detailed animations and interactive features.

improvements.description: Enhance the CSS file with more detailed animations for black hole visuals, including swirling effects, glowing elements, and dynamic transitions to create a more immersive cosmic experience.
Complete the HTML content to include all sections related to black holes, such as interactive planets, animated slides, and additional educational content about black holes.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and implement the mobile menu toggle functionality with proper event handling, smooth transitions, and user-friendly interactions.
